destinations.evidence: The RPC request accepts an optional zkProof field alongside delivery result and SPC proof.
destinations.snippet:
pub proof: Bytes,
#[serde(rename = "zkProof", default, skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
pub zk_proof: Option<Bytes>,

destinations.evidence: The Ethereum node RPC adapter forwards zkProof unchanged into the async delivery submission.
The async pool stores the optional ZK proof when accepting a two-phase delivery and moves the entry to DeliveryReady.
The Phase 2 builder uses the stored optional ZK proof for ZK two-phase callback delivery while preserving long-running HTTP behavior without a ZK proof.

equivalence_argument: The RPC type, node RPC adapter, async pool metadata, and Phase 2 builder all carry the optional zkProof through the same DeliveryReady lifecycle as long-running delivery results.
rationale: The RPC request gains zkProof, the RPC forwards it to submit_delivery_result, pool metadata stores zk_proof, and lifecycle checks use requires_phase2_delivery() so both long-running HTTP and ZK transactions are handled by the delivery path. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: ritual_submitDeliveryResult must accept an optional zkProof field and pass it to the async pool, where ZK two-phase transactions follow the same Phase 2 lifecycle as long-running transactions: awaiting delivery, accepting result plus TEE proof plus optional ZK proof, becoming delivery-ready, and using delivery TTL checks.
suggested_falsification_tests: Submit a delivery result RPC for a 0x0806 async transaction with result, TEE proof, and zkProof; assert the pool stores both proofs, transitions the entry to DeliveryReady, and exposes it through the delivery-ready path. Repeat for a 0x0805 transaction without zkProof and assert backward compatibility.
summary: Optional ZK proof is carried through RPC, pool metadata, and Phase 2 settlement construction.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Submit a 0x0806 delivery result with result, SPC proof, and zkProof; assert pool metadata stores zk_proof and the Phase 2 builder ABI-encodes result plus proof.
title: ZK delivery results carry optional proof through RPC and pool
